title: Coatings for Outdoor Patios and Sidewalks - Elite South Texas
content:
Patios and Sidewalks
Our patio & sidewalk coatings offer durable surfaces in virtually endless designs, textures and colors. Our products can be used to repair and restore surface deterioration as a cost-effective alternative to tear-out and repour of the concrete substrate. These coatings are applied to existing concrete surfaces and can be installed with minimal downtime. They are chemical and stain resistant, as well as resistant to de-icing salts and chemicals and can withstand extreme hot and cold temperatures.
Advantages
Wide selection of colors, patterns, textures and design options
Durable, long lasting
Options for surface repair and restoration without tear out
Easy to clean and maintain
Abrasion and chemical resistant
Options to reduce surface temperature in warmer climates
For new or existing concrete
Resistant to damage from water, de-icing salts and freeze/thaw conditions
UV resistant
Slip resistant in wet or dry conditions
Quick install options for minimal downtime
Polymer Modified Cement
Brochure
SYPP™
